name: Muakkil (موكّل)
one_liner: Mystical AI-agent platform — four spirit agents (Scribe, Seeker, Maker, Herald) collaborate on cross-agent charges through a ritual UX.
demo_pattern: Research X and email/Slack me Y
notes: Onboarded into factory 2026-05-26. PIVOTED 2026-07-02 (decisions/2026-07-02-venture-agent-pivot.md): now a venture agent for non-technical founders — speak an idea, get a built + distributed product. Phase 1 slices 1-6 built (auth, Scribe intake, Seeker validation, thin landing + waitlist, Herald-lite, weekly report); next: slice 7 import-and-launch. Phase-0 validation debt recorded (5 Mom-Test interviews). See status.md.

validation.state: 5 Mom-Test interviews; >=3 raise post-build stall unprompted (source: interview notes — the recorded Phase-0 debt)

launch.state: slice 7 (import-and-launch) shipped + 25 waitlist signups (source: Supabase waitlist)

traction.state: >=1 paying concierge client re-engages after the day-7 report (source: Stripe + email — the pivot decision's own gate)

pmf.state: Sean Ellis >=40% AND retention curve flattens
